name: Dagomon

signature_move.name: Forbidden Trident
signature_move.description: Throws its trident with tremendous physical strength.

description: A wicked god Digimon referred to as the " Sinful Priest of the Ocean Floor ". It is thought to have evolved from a computer virus that would infect computers aboard ships, messing up their bearings and course. It bundles up its innumerable, multiplying tentacles and takes on a humanoid appearance, but its true form is a strange evolution of a Mollusk Digimon. Its Special Move is throwing its trident with tremendous physical strength ( Forbidden Trident ). For its defeated opponents, it holds the rosary around its neck and adopts a pose similar to mourning.
